name: How much is my broken leg from work worth in Ogden?
description: Medical + 66% lost wages + permanent impairment; varies widely.[1][2]

mainEntity.name: How much is my broken leg from work worth in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical + 66% lost wages + permanent impairment; varies widely.[1][2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Value depends on medical bills, lost wages, permanent impairment rating; Utah caps some but includes TTD, PPD, medical.[1][2] No fixed formula—settlements vary.[1] Key factors: Wage replacement ~66%, impairment schedule for PPD; total disability rare. Practical guidance: Use online calculators cautiously, get attorney for accurate valuation based on records. Factors like age, job affect settlement.
